action_set_definitions.name: get_site_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves real-time environmental data and power system metrics, including site stability index and individual power station redundancy ratios.

action_set_definitions.name: identify_sector_cells
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the specific grid cell identifiers corresponding to the coordinate range provided in the mission parameters.

action_set_definitions.name: apply_total_station_survey
action_set_definitions.description: Utilizes the optical Total Station to perform high-precision mapping of a cell, ensuring sub-0.03m accuracy required for legal admissibility.

cell_id.description: The identifier of the grid cell to be surveyed.

action_set_definitions.name: scan_electronic_signatures
action_set_definitions.description: Scans the specified cell for electronic signatures to detect artifacts or fragments buried in the debris.

cell_id.description: The identifier of the cell to scan.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_artifact_identity
action_set_definitions.description: Performs a detailed analysis on a detected signature to identify its specific serial number and verify if it is an intact primary unit.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_precision_recovery
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the high-precision extraction process for the identified artifact.

sig_id.description: The signature ID of the validated intact target.

cell_id.description: The cell identifier where the object is located.

action_set_definitions.name: log_mission_abort
action_set_definitions.description: Terminates the mission and logs the specific safety or procedural reason for the shutdown.

reason.description: Reason for aborting the operation (e.g., 'Safety Violation', 'Target Not Found').

state_description.grid_map: A collection of grid cells where keys are coordinates (e.g., 'A1') and values include status (unexplored, surveyed, excavated), current_depth, and soil_type.
state_description.resource_pool: Available resources for the site including personnel, tools, and budget/energy.
state_description.discovered_artifacts: A log of items found during excavation, including grid source and value/rarity.
state_description.site_conditions: Environmental factors affecting operations like weather or safety hazard levels.
